cinema.name: Cinema B
cinema.description: Welcome to the Hermetic International Film Festival 2026!
cinema.instructions:
INSTRUCTIONS

Desktop

• Mouse to look around | [Esc] to release

• [W][A][S][D] or [←][↑][↓][→] to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

Mobile

• Drag to look around

• Touch the on-screen to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

works.title: Happy who the riddle reads
works.description: The song ('Happy Who The Riddle Read') was originally written/composed in the late 1980s (lyrics written in a notebook, song melody improvised and memorized; the 'bridge' section was improvised more recently) and borrows a short passage (the last verse of the three) from The Emerald Tablet (La Tabula Smaragdina, or Lawh al-Zumurudh) and should be well known to Hermeticists. The video was composed using found or appropriated imagery (film clips via archive.org, with some web-based public domain GIFs) and reflects a free-associative assemblage process.

works.title: Healing The World
works.description: Healing The World - One Human At A Time: "Healers Beyond Boundaries" follows a group of dedicated healers traveling to remote parts of the world to bring hope, light, and transformation to those in need. Trained in the art of energy healing, they touch lives in places like India, Sri Lanka, and Mexico, offering their gift freely. Through powerful encounters and miraculous recoveries, the film reveals the immense potential for healing within every human being. It is a journey of compassion, discovery, and the belief that anyone can awaken the power to heal—one soul at a time.

works.title: I see you, I love you, I feed you
works.description: The arcana of nature is summoned to reawaken and alchemize seven ancestral soups from a Soviet childhood. Childhoods and fortunes vanish, and countries become “former” as immigrant memories, dreams, and fantasies commingle in savory vapors and transmute into healing spells. It is now safe to be seen, to be loved, to be fed.

works.title: IMAGO
works.description: IMAGO explores inner metamorphosis through the language of ritual and visual transformation. On a vivid red field, the performer engages with Tarot cards – The Devil and The World – moving through instinct, shadow and rebirth. The body multiplies and regenerates: the image evokes rather than represents.

works.title: Joy's Coffee
works.description: An artist is plagued by strange phone calls as she teeters on the edge of transformation.

works.title: JUDAS
works.description: This animation explores the heretical Gospel of Judas, adding abstract visual representation of the key elements within the ancient text. The idea of a benevolent god is turned upon its head, as the reality reveals a much more unfortunate creation.

works.title: Lotus-Born Master
works.description: Lotus-Born Master: Journey To The Other Side Of The Black Hole – The five wisdom Dakini's consorts of Guru Padmasambhava the Lotus Born Master have come back in this era in the plot underlying this yet to be released film. By virtue of their respective cosmic powers, they have rescued our planet from the conspiracy of the imperial president and his infamous intelligence agency. Does something sound familiar... The director, through the plot of an action science fiction film, applies the teachings of Guru Padmasambhava the Lotus Born Master to the crises our present world is confronted with, and discloses the scientificity of the doctrines imparted by Guru Padmasambhava the Lotus Born Master as well as how to utilize them to convert negative energy into positive energy. "Lotus Born Master: Journey to the Other Side of the Black Hole" is the third part of the series of science fiction films written and directed by Laurence Brahm. The other two are "Lotus Born Master: The Shambhala Access Code" and "Lotus Born Master: The Algorithm of Karma". This series of experimental avant-garde films, has garnered more than twenty major awards at international film festivals and shocked many.

works.title: Hermetic Film Festival
works.description: We want to celebrate the visions - cinematography and Hermetica are both terrific imaginatively visionary cultures. Contemporary esotericism is intimately, and increasingly, connected with popular culture and new media: for this reason, we want to support such a visual fascination, the storylines revolving around neglected knowledge and the frantic search for the divine upon hidden paths of spirituality.

works.title: Holy Mountain Gallery
works.description: The Holy Mountain Gallery is the official venue partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival. “The Holy” is currently developing an Infinite Virtual Museum and a global Map of Artists. Check it out for exhibitions and more.

works.title: Sacrisoft
works.description: Sacrisoft is the official technical partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and developed this virtual cinema. The company creates a wide range of innovative independent software, including a Landing Page Creator for your next film project, a Video Art Remix Machine, and an awesome Movie Poster Maker. These tools will be available worldwide soon, so stay tuned.

works.title: Gifigo
works.description: Gifigo is the official media partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival, publishing festival reviews and fresh insights on tech, culture, and society on the go.

works.title: Lucid Lake Institute
works.description: The Lucid Lake Institute is the official research partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and is dedicated to the study of Western Esotericism and Quantum Philosophy.

works.title: Hermetic Film Festival
works.description: We want to celebrate the visions - cinematography and Hermetica are both terrific imaginatively visionary cultures. Contemporary esotericism is intimately, and increasingly, connected with popular culture and new media: for this reason, we want to support such a visual fascination, the storylines revolving around neglected knowledge and the frantic search for the divine upon hidden paths of spirituality.

works.title: Lucifer's Gala
works.description: Lucifer's Gala - The Church of Satan 50th Anniversary Conclave Ritual: This is a gritty documentary short film by Robert Merciless depicting the 50th anniversary conclave ritual of the Church of Satan. The church was established on April 30, 1966 by Anton Szandor LaVey who later went on to author The Satanic Bible and The Satanic Rituals establishing for the first time in human history the actual formalized practice of Satanism as a religion. It is a atheistic and materialistic religion centering the mythical character of Satan as a symbol for a life of strength focused on indulgence in earthly pleasures in the here and now rather than abstinence, spirituality and hope for a fanciful after life. The church has endured and flourished and LaVey's books have remained in constant publication for over half a century. To celebrate 50 years of the existence of the church, a large group of members and intimate guests from around the world gathered in Poughkeepsie, NY on April 30, 2016 for an elegant gala and ritual to mark the occasion. Compiled from decade-old photos and video shot in low light in a noisy room, this somewhat rough production was created in order to document that historical event. It provides a very rare look at a complete, large-scale, authentic Satanic group ritual. CONTENT WARNING: This film contains partial nudity and religious blasphemy.

works.title: Lux Vera 6023
works.description:
Freemasonry is one of the world's most secretive organizations, and for the first time, this documentary unveils long-hidden truths.
Presenter Morris gains access to a stunning Masonic lodge in Brindisi, a city with deep Templar roots, considered ancestors of Freemasonry.
The film reveals unseen footage of the lodge, rituals, and explanations of Masonic symbols and artifacts. It also tackles sensitive topics through interviews with Freemasons of varying ranks, from initiates to Honorary Grand Master Stefano Erario.
This documentary offers a unique glimpse into a secretive world, revealing surprising answers and intertwining Freemasonry with modern life.

works.title: Melissa Mari
works.description:
Melissa Mari: Musical Alchemist of Stage and Psyche
In 2013, two California rock musicians came together in a romantic and creative partnership that sparked a metaphysical and spiritual explosion within their consciousness. Their relationship became an alchemical vessel for the healing of their inner wounds and a laboratory for investigating the shadow side of the human psyche. They also developed a progressive rock band which brought their ideas and experiences into performance art, they wrote books and created an esoteric philosophy for life. They realized that what they were doing was rare and important so they documented their progress on video over the course of their 12 year time together which concluded with Melissa’s death in early 2025. Colin Davis, Melissa’s partner and the film’s director produced this documentary to tell the story of their prolific life together and to showcase Melissa’s incredible musical talent, her personal struggles and her absolutely courageous dedication to inner healing. This is a work of pure love for Melissa’s soul and her unique genius as a human being.
